title: CentoUI Component Registry Entry
description: Describes a single installable CentoUI component. One file per component, located at registry/<name>.json.

name.description: Unique component identifier in kebab-case. Must match the registry filename (e.g. 'button' for button.json) and is the name used in `centoui add <name>`.

description.description: Short human-readable description shown in CLI output and documentation.

files.description: Source file paths relative to packages/core/src/. All paths must start with 'components/' — the CLI fetches them from GitHub and writes them into the user's configured components directory.

items.description: Path relative to packages/core/src/. Must start with 'components/' and end with a supported extension (.vue, .ts, or .css).

componentDeps.description: Names of other CentoUI components that must be installed alongside this one. The CLI resolves the full transitive dependency tree automatically.

items.description: Component name in kebab-case, matching its registry filename (e.g. 'button', 'label').

packageDeps.description: npm packages required by this component beyond the global dependencies in globals.json. The CLI installs these automatically when the component is added.

additionalProperties.description: Semver version range for the package (e.g. '^1.0.0', '~2.3.1', '>=3.0.0').
